     The Numbers Business Report

Turning Red (2022)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $1,399,001Details
International Box Office $20,122,621
Worldwide Box Office $21,521,622
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,011,073
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,108,666
Total $2,119,739
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Mei Lee is a 13-year-old who suddenly “poofs” into a giant red panda when she gets too excited (which is practically ALWAYS). Mei Lee’s protective, if not slightly overbearing mother Ming, who is never far from her daughter—an unfortunate reality for the teenager.

Metrics

Legs:2.42 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:6.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$175,000,000 (worldwide box office is 0.1 times production budget)
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $1,479,404

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: March 11th, 2022 (Canceled) by Walt Disney
February 9th, 2024 (Wide) by Walt Disney
International Releases: March 10th, 2022 (Wide) (Philippines)
March 10th, 2022 (Wide), released as Crvena panda (Croatia)
March 11th, 2022 (Wide) (Saudi Arabia)
March 11th, 2022 (Wide) (Poland)
March 11th, 2022 (Wide) (United Arab Emirates)
Video Release: March 11th, 2022 by Disney+
MPA Rating: PG for thematic material, suggestive content and language.
(Rating bulletin 2708 (cert #53432), 11/24/2021)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Plot point: Curses, Dysfunctional Family, Human Animal Transformation
Subgenre: Family Adventure
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Adventure
Production Method:Digital Animation
Creative Type:Science Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Disney-Pixar
Production Countries: United States, Canada
Languages: English

Synopsis

Mei Lee is a 13-year-old who suddenly “poofs” into a giant red panda when she gets too excited (which is practically ALWAYS). Mei Lee’s protective, if not slightly overbearing mother Ming, who is never far from her daughter—an unfortunate reality for the teenager.
